recommendations.title: Saving Bikini Bottom: The Sandy Cheeks Movie
recommendations.overview: When Bikini Bottom is scooped from the ocean, scientific squirrel Sandy Cheeks and her pal SpongeBob SquarePants saddle up for Texas to save their town.

recommendations.title: Elvis & Nixon
recommendations.overview: In 1970, a few days before Christmas, Elvis Presley showed up on the White House lawn seeking to be deputized into the Bureau of Narcotics and Dangerous Drugs by the President himself.

recommendations.title: Hateship Loveship
recommendations.overview: A shy caretaker believes that the father of her teenage charge is falling in love with her, unaware that she is actually the victim of the girl's prank.

recommendations.title: La Dolce Vita
recommendations.overview: Episodic journey of journalist Marcello who struggles to find his place in the world, torn between the allure of Rome's elite social scene and the stifling domesticity offered by his girlfriend, all the while searching for a way to become a serious w

recommendations.title: I've Loved You So Long
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to interact with her family and find her place in society after spending fifteen years in prison.

recommendations.title: The Shack
recommendations.overview: A grieving man receives a mysterious, personal invitation to meet with God at a place called 'The Shack'.

recommendations.title: Brothers
recommendations.overview: When his helicopter goes down during his fourth tour of duty in Afghanistan, Marine Sam Cahill is presumed dead. Back home, brother Tommy steps in to look over Sam’s wife, Grace, and two children. Sam’s surprise homecoming triggers domestic mayhem.

recommendations.title: Stop-Loss
recommendations.overview: A veteran soldier returns from his completed tour of duty in Iraq, only to find his life turned upside down when he is arbitrarily ordered to return to field duty by the Army.

recommendations.title: Out of the Clear Blue Sky
recommendations.overview: Returning to Earth as an imitator, the legendary Mexican artist Pedro Infante must prove that he is no longer a womanizer to enter paradise.

recommendations.title: In the Valley of Elah
recommendations.overview: A career officer and his wife work with a police detective to uncover the truth behind their son's disappearance following his return from a tour of duty in Iraq.
